category_sources: Official repository description says Weaver is a dependency injection framework for Swift on iOS, macOS, and Linux.
source_facts.description says it provides the command-line tool for Weaver.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README documents installation, command-line usage, and Xcode build phase usage.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/scribd/Weaver; returned null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official README documents building and installing the command-line tool.
Official repository description identifies a Swift dependency injection framework for iOS, macOS, and Linux.
